title: geum rubellum
intro: Geum rubellum, also known as the lady's mantle, is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Geum rubellum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and support liver health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
